prompt.content:
The client has realised that hires from the current FY that were recruited through Greenhouse ATS haven't been updated in the Workday platform. Using the Get Application tool in GreenhouseATS, please retrieve all new hires from the current FY.

Then, in the Workday application, create the new cost centre named CC-5000 and the job_id named JP-0100, with the title "Generalist", job family "Administration", and job level "L3". 

Using the Workday new-hire tool, please hire all current FY hires recruited through Greenhouse ATS for CC-5000, Org-ID 1010, and job profile ID JP-0100. 

Then, using the Workday list worker tool, report the total number of active workers we have hired as of 31st October 2025.

Please report the answer directly in console. The financial year would be from 1st April 2025 to 31st March 2026. Both dates are inclusive.

rubrics.name: States that the total number of workers hired as of 31st October 2025 is 41... (ver_941ac5965c2d49248c8f35674b0e2f6b)

messages.content: States that the total number of workers hired as of 31st October 2025 is 41 (acceptable range 30.7 to 31.3).

golden_responses.golden_text_response: The total number of active workers we have hired as of 31st October 2025 is 41
